incident: Flooding near Riverside Zone has displaced 18 families into a temporary shelter. Relief teams need dry food kits, baby supplies, blankets, and transport support before nightfall.
support: Dry food kits, baby supplies, blankets, transport support

incident: Heavy rains have submerged the main road connecting North Point to the relief camp. Volunteers with boats or high-clearance vehicles are urgently needed for evacuation support.
support: Boat operators, evacuation support, emergency transport

incident: A makeshift flood shelter in East Market is running out of drinking water and sanitation supplies. Immediate procurement and delivery support is needed for 60+ displaced residents.
support: Drinking water, sanitation kits, hygiene supplies

incident: Riverside Zone families who evacuated last week are returning to damaged homes. They need structural assessment volunteers, cleaning supplies, and temporary repair materials.
support: Structural assessment, cleaning supplies, repair materials

incident: Children at the North Point flood relief camp have no access to learning materials or recreational activities. Volunteer educators and activity kits are needed for the next two weeks.
support: Learning kits, volunteer educators, recreational supplies
